title: Update regression tests for four-pool schema and blocked patterns
objective: Update blind box content model tests to validate the four-pool schema and blocked pattern rules.
requirements: Replace FIVE_LAYER_KEYS with a four-pool key constant.
Assert conditional_items and blocked_or_risky are absent from pilot bundles.
Update forbidden pattern scan to cover all four default pools.
Replace blocked_or_risky leakage test with a no-risk-candidate-pool or blocked_patterns test.
Keep existing input override and risky item state tests.
acceptance_criteria: Tests fail if old candidate pools return.
Tests fail if blocked pattern terms enter any default content pool.

result.summary: Updated tests to assert the four-pool schema, old pool removal, compatibility mapping, and blocked pattern filtering.
